languages.original_text: "Only a Rogue Trader would make such a claim. Do you really think that your unique position as the Emperor's anointed, which grants you unheard-of liberties, translates so easily to the rest of us?"

languages.text: "Подобное заявление может выдвинуть лишь Вольный Торговец. Неужели вы считате, что ваша уникальная позиция помазанни{mf|ка|цы} {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Императора{/g}, дарующая вам небывалые свободы, так легко транслируется на остальных?"

traits.locale_text: "Подобное заявление может выдвинуть лишь Вольный Торговец. Неужели вы считате, что ваша уникальная позиция помазанни{mf|ка|цы} {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Императора{/g}, дарующая вам небывалые свободы, так легко транслируется на остальных?"

"Only a Rogue Trader would make such a claim. Do you really think that your unique position as the Emperor's anointed, which grants you unheard-of liberties, translates so easily to the rest of us?"
"Only a Rogue Trader would make such a claim. Do you really think that your unique position as the Emperor's anointed, which grants you unheard-of liberties, translates so easily to the rest of us?"

languages.text: «Solo un{mf|o|a} Comerciante Independiente podría decir algo así. ¿De verdad cree que su posición única como ungid{mf|o|a} del {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Emperador{/g}, que le concede libertades inimaginables, puede aplicarse sin más al resto de nosotros?».
languages.original_text: "Only a Rogue Trader would make such a claim. Do you really think that your unique position as the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Emperor{/g}'s anointed, which grants you unheard-of liberties, translates so easily to the rest of us?"

traits.locale_text: «Solo un{mf|o|a} Comerciante Independiente podría decir algo así. ¿De verdad cree que su posición única como ungid{mf|o|a} del {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Emperador{/g}, que le concede libertades inimaginables, puede aplicarse sin más al resto de nosotros?».

languages.text: “那是因为您是行商浪人。您当真以为，您作为{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}帝皇{/g}神选者的独特地位，获得了那些闻所未闻的自由，就能如此轻易地套用到我们其他人身上？”
languages.original_text: "Only a Rogue Trader would make such a claim. Do you really think that your unique position as the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Emperor{/g}'s anointed, which grants you unheard-of liberties, translates so easily to the rest of us?"

traits.locale_text: “那是因为您是行商浪人。您当真以为，您作为{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}帝皇{/g}神选者的独特地位，获得了那些闻所未闻的自由，就能如此轻易地套用到我们其他人身上？”

languages.text: « Voilà bien une réflexion de {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Pensez-vous vraiment qu'en tant qu'{mf|élu|élue} de {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}l'Empereur{/g}, une position unique qui s'accompagne de bien des libertés, vous soyez en mesure de parler pour nous autres, simples sujets ? »
languages.original_text: "Only a Rogue Trader would make such a claim. Do you really think that your unique position as the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Emperor{/g}'s anointed, which grants you unheard-of liberties, translates so easily to the rest of us?"

traits.locale_text: « Voilà bien une réflexion de {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Pensez-vous vraiment qu'en tant qu'{mf|élu|élue} de {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}l'Empereur{/g}, une position unique qui s'accompagne de bien des libertés, vous soyez en mesure de parler pour nous autres, simples sujets ? »

languages.text: "Das würde nur {mf|ein Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin} fordern. Denkt Ihr wirklich, Eure einzigartige Stellung als {mf|Gesalbter|Gesalbte}, die Euch beispiellose Freiheiten gewährt, lässt sich so einfach auf den Rest von uns übertragen?"
languages.original_text: "Only a Rogue Trader would make such a claim. Do you really think that your unique position as the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Emperor{/g}'s anointed, which grants you unheard-of liberties, translates so easily to the rest of us?"

traits.locale_text: "Das würde nur {mf|ein Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin} fordern. Denkt Ihr wirklich, Eure einzigartige Stellung als {mf|Gesalbter|Gesalbte}, die Euch beispiellose Freiheiten gewährt, lässt sich so einfach auf den Rest von uns übertragen?"

languages.text: 「そんなことを言うのはローグ・トレーダーだけだ。前代未聞の自由を認める皇帝の叙任者という特殊な立場が、そう簡単に他の人間に通じると本気で思っているのか？」
languages.original_text: "Only a Rogue Trader would make such a claim. Do you really think that your unique position as the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Emperor{/g}'s anointed, which grants you unheard-of liberties, translates so easily to the rest of us?"

traits.locale_text: 「そんなことを言うのはローグ・トレーダーだけだ。前代未聞の自由を認める皇帝の叙任者という特殊な立場が、そう簡単に他の人間に通じると本気で思っているのか？」

languages.text: "Sadece bir Hür Tacir böyle bir iddiada bulunabilir. Gerçekten {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}İmparator'un{/g} seçilmişi olarak sahip olduğunuz, size duyulmamış özgürlükler tanıyan eşsiz konumunuzdan kaynaklanan ifadelerinizin herkese hitap edeceğini mi düşünüyorsunuz?"
languages.original_text: "Only a Rogue Trader would make such a claim. Do you really think that your unique position as the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Emperor{/g}'s anointed, which grants you unheard-of liberties, translates so easily to the rest of us?"
